data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Time between steps (processing time)', but the evidence provided does not include any specific data or checks that confirm the processing times between the steps of the service. The evidence only details the bookings and their statuses without addressing the required processing times between the services. This constitutes a clear gap in the requirement as specified in the exploratory step.
gaps: No evidence of processing times between the steps of the service.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
